title: Talent Acquisition Manager|Healthcare
description:
Job Description

We are looking for an experienced and strategic Talent Acquisition Manager to lead our client's recruitment function and support the organization’s workforce growth. The successful candidate will manage a team of recruiters, drive high-volume hiring, and partner closely with stakeholders to deliver effective and efficient talent acquisition strategies.

Key Responsibilities

  • Lead, coach, and manage a team of 8 talent acquisition professionals, including performance management and development.

  • Co-develop and implement strategic talent acquisition plans aligned with organizational workforce needs.

  • Drive operational excellence across all recruitment processes, policies, and procedures.

  • Manage high-volume recruitment activities while ensuring quality, compliance, and efficiency.

  • Monitor recruitment trends, labour market developments, and best practices to continuously improve hiring strategies.

  • Analyze recruitment metrics and prepare regular reports for senior management.

  • Build and maintain strong working relationships with internal stakeholders, hiring managers, external recruitment agencies, and educational institutions.

  • Ensure compliance with relevant employment laws and organizational policies.

Requirements / Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or a related discipline.

  • At least 10 years of relevant experience in talent acquisition or recruitment, preferably within healthcare or a related industry.

  • Proven experience in leading and developing high-performing recruitment teams.

  • Demonstrated success in managing high-volume hiring.

  • Strong knowledge of recruitment best practices, tools, and industry trends.

  • Excellent communication, interpersonal, and stakeholder management skills.

  • Experience in developing and executing strategic hiring plans.

  • Strong organizational skills with meticulous attention to detail.

  • Proactive, analytical, and decisive with strong problem-solving capabilities.

Personal Attributes

  • Meticulous and detail-oriented

  • Proactive and self-motivated

  • Decisive and confident in decision-making

  • Forward-thinking and adaptable to change

  • Strong leadership and team-building abilities

postedCompany.description: Worq Health is an AI recruitment platform for nurses and healthcare workers that provides a more efficient, smarter & better hiring experience. Worq Health utilizes AI for matching the right nurses with open jobs, leveraging the latest NLP/LLM technology and proprietary skillsets taxonomy. Find out more on our website (https://worqhealth.com/nurse.html)
postedCompany.name: WORQ PTE. LTD.
